description: A grounded, tactile agricultural utility dashboard focused on clarity, natural aesthetics, and dense data tracking. Avoids typical 'SaaS Blue' in favor of deep forest greens, terracotta, and warm bone-whites.

rules.note: Use 'Tinted Grey' rule. Never pure black or #808080. All greys must be tinted with warm sand or sage.

rules: Card Style: Flat background, 1px subtle border, max 8px border-radius, NO soft drop-shadows. Use 'Neumorphism: Clay & Crisp' strictly where needed.
Grid Borders (Technical Look): Container with border-collapse, items with right and bottom borders for data-heavy sections.

components.strategy: Shadcn components heavily customized. Flat, rectangular, dense styles. AVOID excessive rounded cards.
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-[#152B23]. Use sharp edges or max rounded-md.
components.cards: Cardless or Grid Borders style. No massive floating cards. Keep it grounded.
components.tables: Dense rows. Header text uppercase tracking-wider text-xs. Left-aligned data. Subtle bottom borders.
components.navigation: Solid background (white) header with 1px bottom border. z-50.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input/Select. Borders must be crisp 1px solid border.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight, consistent across app. Installation: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react

images.rules: Never use placeholders. Use provided URLs for login backgrounds, empty states, or visual accents.

login_hero.description: High-quality generated agricultural/irrigation visual for the login hero section. Overlay with bg-black/30 max if text is placed on top.

motion.strategy: Minimalist. Hover states translate-y-px. Focus rings 2px primary with 2px offset.
rules: Hover text must explicitly change color or contrast.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENT UI using React + Tailwind + Shadcn/UI primitives. Convert the HEX colors above into HSL format in /app/frontend/src/index.css.
2. INSTALL fonts 'Work Sans' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts in index.css, and configure them in tailwind.config.js.

4. BUILD the following core screens: Login Screen (using login_hero image), Admin Dashboard (KPIs, active vs pending dues), Consumer Management (Add/Delete/List), Billing/Rate Configuration (Bigha/Katha calc), Payment Entry & History, SMS Notification dispatch.
5. NO PLACEHOLDER IMAGES. Use the URLs provided in this file.
6. ADD data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and functional elements.
